bird.name: Cape Verde warbler
bird.summary: The Cape Verde warbler (Acrocephalus brevipennis) is an Old World warbler in the genus Acrocephalus. It is also known as the Cape Verde can…

locations.name: 聖尼古勞島
locations.summary: 聖尼古勞島（葡萄牙語：São Nicolau），又译为圣尼古拉岛，是西非國家佛得角的島嶼，位於聖盧西亞島和薩爾島之間，屬於向風群島。長45公里、寬22公里，面積343平方公里，最高點海拔高度1,312米。2015年人口数量为12,424人…

locations.name: 聖地牙哥島 (維德角)
locations.summary: 聖地亚哥島（葡萄牙語：Ilha de Santiago，得名于雅各）是維德角最大的島嶼，屬於背風群島的一部分，長75公里、寬35公里，面積達991平方公里，最高點海拔高度1,394米，位於大西洋。聖地亚哥島是該國最重要的農業中心。該國約一…

relations.subject: Cape Verde warbler
relations.evidence: After a specimen was found in a Lisbon museum, a survey was made on São Nicolau island in 1998 and some individuals were found there.{{cite journal|last=Hazevoet |first=C

relations.subject: Cape Verde warbler

relations.subject: Cape Verde warbler
relations.evidence: The population trend of the Cape Verde warbler is thought to be declining, probably because of habitat destruction and the droughts that have beset the islands.{{cite book|last=Hazevoet |first=C
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
